name: Baza
description: Make easy prey of enemies with this quiet, agile, and pinpoint accurate Tenno submachine gun.

components.name: Alloy Plate
components.description:
Carbon steel plates used to reinforce Grineer armor.

Location: Venus, Phobos, Ceres, Jupiter, Pluto, and Sedna.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Make easy prey of enemies with this quiet, agile, and pinpoint accurate Tenno submachine gun.

components.name: Cryotic
components.description:
Usually found in extreme sub-zero environments, Cryotic instantly freezes anything it contacts.

Location: Excavation Missions on Venus, Earth, Phobos, Europa, and Neptune

components.name: Ferrite
components.description:
Alloy pellets used in Grineer manufacturing.

Location: Mercury, Earth, Lua, Neptune, and the Void

components.name: Forma
components.description: This shape-altering component is fundamental to Orokin construction. Allows you to change the polarity of a mod slot on a Warframe, Companions or Weapon and then resets their affinity to Unranked. This can only be used on max Rank Warframes, Companions and Weapons.

patchlogs.name: Echoes of Veilbreaker: Update 32.1
patchlogs.changes:
For trading, players that have differing Cross Platform Play settings can still go to Maroo’s Bazaar to go through with their trades. 
Fixed getting the “Unable to join Maroo's Bazaar while in a squad with other platforms.” error message when attempting to join a Host’s Orbiter from a different platform.
Fixed PC Clients experiencing black screens and loss of functionality when hosted by Xbox players if the squad loads into Maroo’s Bazaar from the Navigation screen.

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Hotfix 32.0.3
patchlogs.changes:
On November 16th, 2021, we launched a time-limited scheduled event in Maroo’s Bazaar on all Platforms: Prime Resurgence. In the goal of addressing the major pain points with our Prime Vault program, we put Prime Resurgence to the test as an alternative. After several weeks of rotating through Primed goods, we concluded the event in successful fashion.
selecting this option will prompt a confirmation window before taking you to Varzia in Maroo’s Bazaar.  
Added a ‘Prime Resurgence’ tab in the in-game Market where Aya and Regal Aya purchases can be made instead of traveling to Maroo’s Bazaar.

patchlogs.name: Update 31.5: Angels of the Zariman
patchlogs.changes: Clans can now post ads by visiting Maroo in her Bazaar or accessing their Clan Menu and paying Maroo an administrative fee using resources from your Clan Vault. Each week, Maroo will be in need of a different resource for her own ‘endeavors’ and in exchange she will put the word out for you. These ads will appear in the updated Clan Menu under ‘Search for Clan’.

patchlogs.name: The New War: Hotfix 31.0.11
patchlogs.changes: Varzia still resides in Maroo’s Bazaar with a selection of wares. If you choose, any remaining Aya/Regal Aya can be used in Varzia’s post-event shop or can be held onto for potential future Prime Vault efforts. While the future of Prime Resurgence is still being determined, priority in any instance will be to provide options that appropriately meets player expectations for premium purchases.

patchlogs.name: Update 31: The New War
patchlogs.fixes:
Ivara Prime, Baza Prime, and Aksomati Prime have entered the Prime Vault!
Replaced Perrin Sequence Sacrifice of Baza Prime Stock with Panthera Prime Receiver
Fixed being able to dodge Trading zone restrictions in Maroo’s Bazaar around Varzia by jumping.

patchlogs.name: Prime Resurgence: Hotfix 30.9.4
patchlogs.changes: Varzia, a Dax from the Old War, has made her temporary home in Maroo’s Bazaar with a slew of Prime goods for you to obtain. You can either purchase Relics from her Wares with Aya (free path) or gain instant access to Prime items and bundles with Regal Aya (purchase path).

patchlogs.name: Update 30.9.0: Prime Resurgence
patchlogs.changes: Maroo now has a Ayatan inspired map marker in Maroo’s Bazaar.
patchlogs.fixes: Varzia, a Dax from the Old War, will appear in Maroo’s Bazaar November 16th on all Platforms with a slew of Prime goods for you to obtain. You can either purchase Relics from her Wares with Aya (free path) or gain instant access to Prime items and bundles with Regal Aya (purchase path).

patchlogs.name: Gara Prime: Update 30.3.0
patchlogs.fixes:
Replaced Perrin Sequence Sacrifice of Ninkondi Prime Handle with Baza Prime Stock.
Fixed Maroo’s Bazaar dock floor light having wrong texture/missing light.

patchlogs.name: Call of the Tempestarii: Update 30
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed incorrect ingame Market icon for the Baza Prime Stock.

patchlogs.name: Update 29.5: Deimos Arcana
patchlogs.changes: Added a “Visit Maroo” button to travel to Maroo’s Bazaar.

patchlogs.name: The Steel Path: Inaros Prime 28.2.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed not being able to open the pause menu after setting up a trade shop in Maroo's Bazaar.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Update 27.2.0
patchlogs.additions: Trading is an essential part of Warframe and we felt it important to inform players on how to proceed with trading in a safe manner. All players will be presented with the “Trading Policy” window when trading for the first time ever (Mastery Rank 2 players who have just unlocked trading), and for the first time since downloading the update. This applies to any instance of trading in the Dojo and in Maroo’s Bazaar. Once you’ve accepted the Policy you may access it from the “Trading Policy” button when trading if desired.

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Ivara Prime 27.0.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Aksomati Prime and Baza Prime having the same Riven Disposition as their normal variants despite the UI displaying their correct Disposition of 1.

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Ivara Prime 27.0.6.1
patchlogs.changes: You can now trade Avionics in your Dojo or Maroo’s Bazaar!

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Ivara Prime 27.0.4
patchlogs.changes:
Practice stealth as you track your prey, then strike with ruthless precision as Ivara Prime! No hunt is complete without the Baza Prime and Aksomati Prime!
You can find Ivara Prime, Baza Prime, and Aksomati Prime Relics in their classic spots (Void, Derelict, Defense, Survival, etc) with the addition of Railjack missions

patchlogs.name: The Old Blood: Hotfix 26.0.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed inability to see what players are selling in Maroo’s Bazaar.

patchlogs.name: Atlas Prime: Hotfix 25.8.2
patchlogs.changes: Fixed a script error/loss of functionality if you fail to complete a trade in Maroo's Bazaar.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 25.4.1 + 25.4.1.1
patchlogs.changes: Baza Tekelu Skin

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon Remaster: Update 24.6.0
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed the Baza, Zhuge, and Zlok Riven Dispositions not reflecting the changes stated in Hotfix 24.5.8.1. For clarity, they have changed to:
Baza: 1.1->1.0

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Update 24.4.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a level hole in Relays and Maroo’s Bazaar that allowed players to escape.

patchlogs.name: Chimera: Hotfix 23.10.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed rare case of hearing random jumbled dialog when loading into Maroo’s Bazaar.

patchlogs.name: Chimera: Update 23.10
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed issue where, when players reviewed their Profiles while in the trade item selection window at Maroo’s Bazaar, their information would appear behind items.

patchlogs.name: Mask of the Revenant: Chroma Prime 23.9.0 + 23.9.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Maroo’s Bazaar minimap being disconnected.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Update 23.2.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Warframe Helmet selection UI indicating you do not own the Warframe they are for when trading it in Maroo’s Bazaar.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Prime Vault Hotfix 23.1.2!
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed audio crackling when firing the Baza with Ivara's Prowl ability.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Update 23
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the mini map overlapping the Trade item selection screen in Maroo’s Bazaar.

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Update 22.20.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue where items set up for sale in Maroo's Bazaar will disappear above the player’s head when opening the pause menu.

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Update 22.19.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed ambient sounds disappearing in certain areas of Maroo's Bazaar.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Mirage Prime 22.7.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed sounds not playing properly when firing the Baza.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.5.0 + 22.5.0.1
patchlogs.changes:
Reduced the camera rotation of the Baza's recoil from the hip.
Reduced the delay before auto reloading an empty mag while using the Baza.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.4.0
patchlogs.changes:
*Baza and Cassowar Blueprints can be researched in your Clan Dojo’s Tenno Lab.
*The Baza Collection is available for purchase in the In-Game Market.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.1.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed all cases of Maroo’s Bazaar being located on Earth instead of Mars.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Update 22: Plains of Eidolon
patchlogs.changes: Maroo's Bazaar is now located on Mars.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Update 20.5.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed sell screen for Ayatan Sculptures and Prime Parts in Maroo’s Bazaar/Relay showing all items.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Update 20.3.0
patchlogs.changes: Maroo's prompt will now always overlap players' shop prompt in Maroo’s Bazaar.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Hotfix 20.0.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Octavia’s emote music at times suddenly changing volume in the Relay and Maroo’s Bazaar.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Hotfix 20.0.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Octavia not playing her music when dancing in Maroo's Bazaar.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Update 20
patchlogs.changes:
The Relays and Maroo’s Bazaar now offer dedicated music zones, where you can share your Mandachord compositions and boogie down with fellow Tenno. Simply bring Octavia to one of the areas marked with the symbol seen in the image below, and select any of the Narta emotes listed above to start the party.
Trading in the Dojo now works similarly to trading in the Maroo's Bazaar where players can "set up shop". The trading post still shows all players in the Dojo with trades remaining for the day, but Players can now start a trade from the Trading Post or by interacting with another Player who is in trading mode.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Player Store preview in Maroo’s Bazaar only showing the first item for sale after the initial cycle, as per: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/763514-maroos-bazaar-is-practically-unusable-now/
Fixed Clan Dojo UI showing “Conclave” instead of “Earth” if a clanmate was in Maroo’s Bazaar.
Fixed the Citadella Syandana VFX lingering on other players when talking to Maroo in Maroo’s Bazaar.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 19.13.1
patchlogs.changes: Those that have been trade-banned or are below the minimum Mastery Rank for trading can now enter Maroo’s Bazaar to trade Ayatan for Endo from Maroo, but trading with other players in the Bazaar will not be accessible.

patchlogs.name: Update 19.13.0
patchlogs.changes: Maroo can now be interrupted if you want to progress the conversation in her Bazaar!

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Hotfix 19.9.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed inconsistent terminology and grammar in Maroo’s Bazaar and elsewhere.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Update 19.8.0
patchlogs.changes: Removed the Credit cost from Maroo's Ayatan to Endo conversion in Maroo's Bazaar.

patchlogs.name: The War Within: Hotfix 19.3.2 + 19.3.2.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed players not showing up on minimap in Relays & Maroo’s Bazaa.

patchlogs.name: The War Within: 19.1.0 Ash Revisited
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a loss of functionality in Maroo's Bazaar.

patchlogs.name: Update 19: The War Within
patchlogs.changes: You can now go to Maroo’s Bazaar even if you have reached your daily trade limit. This fixes players unable to do the Ayatan Sculpture mission due to reaching their trade limit.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Mods that are being sold by a player in Maroo’s Bazaar appearing jittery and having a ‘Conclave’ text.

patchlogs.name: The Index Preview
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an unresponsive screen due to Clients returning to their Liset and Hosts returning to Maroos Bazaar after completing an Ayatan Sculpture hunt mission.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.8.2
patchlogs.fixes: •    Fixed Maroo’s name not being translated in the Bazaar.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.7.0
patchlogs.additions: •    You can now move around in Maroo’s Bazaar while in Vendor mode! Please note that a message will prompt that you’ve been kicked out of Vendor mode if you leave the trading area.
patchlogs.changes: •    Improved the visual FX of the ‘Trade’ button in Maroo’s Bazaar.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.5.4
patchlogs.changes: •    Chat is now enabled in 'Vendor Mode' in Maroo's Bazaar.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.5.1
patchlogs.fixes: Players can now advertise XP locked items when setting up shop in Maroo’s Bazaar.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.2.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed trade icons in Maroo’s Bazaar showing as a white box.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.1.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed players being able to unintentionally create multiple trade windows while in vendor mode in Maroo’s Bazaar.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.0.8
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed trade emotes exclusive to Maroo’s Bazaar being equippable for use outside of Maroo’s Bazaar.
Fixed players not being able to see new players entering the trading zone within Maroo’s Bazaar.
Fixed a visual bug causing players to see other players floating through the air in Maroo’s Bazaar.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.0.6 + 18.0.6.1
patchlogs.changes: Slightly adjusted the size of trade icons in Maroo’s Bazaar.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.0.4
patchlogs.changes: Removed Navigation and Conclave options from Maroo’s Bazaar.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed some areas of Maroo’s Bazaar that would not properly allow players to trade.
Fixed Arsenal and Mod screens not appearing properly in Maroo’s Bazaar.
Fixed an error that would occur in Maroo’s Bazaar that would prevent players from being able to Trade after opening their Trade menu.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.0.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error that would occur when clicking ‘Tutorial’ in the Ducat Kiosk at Maroo’s Bazaar. We've since removed any functionality these kiosks have save for Baro count-down.

patchlogs.name: Update 18: The Second Dream
patchlogs.additions:
Maroo’s Bazaar: Found on Earth, Maroo’s Bazaar is a place where players can go to trade or advertise their goods.
Normal trade limitations are still in place for Trades done through Maroo’s Bazaar.
